entry.headline: Jump Deploys AI Intake, Document Intelligence and Meeting Automation Firmwide Across Perennial RIA Platform
entry.the_so_what: Perennial's firmwide deployment — using Jump's AI infrastructure explicitly as a recruiting weapon against legacy firms — confirms that at 27,000 advisors and with agentic execution already live, Jump has crossed the point where operational AI is no longer a workflow tool but a talent acquisition moat, a structural advantage Zocks at 5,000+ firms and Holistiplan (tax-focused, non-agentic) have no current architecture to replicate.
entry.summary: Jump's AI operating system now automates the full advisor workflow at Perennial Financial Services — spanning AI Intake Forms, Document Intelligence, CRM automation and pre- and post-meeting preparation — deployed firmwide after an initial partnership dating to 2024. The platform converts unstructured client conversation data into structured, actionable follow-through without manual advisor intervention, addressing the documented gap between capturing AI insights and operationalizing them at scale. Perennial is explicitly using Jump's AI infrastructure as a differentiator in recruiting advisors away from legacy firms, citing elimination of administrative burden as the value proposition. Jump reports 27,000+ advisors on its platform and holds the top ranking in advisor satisfaction and adoption in the 2025 T3/Inside Information Software Survey. The expanded deployment follows Jump's recent launch of its 'Operate' product line, designed to move firms from AI-generated insight to automated execution.

key_stat.label: advisors on Jump's platform across the industry

capability_evidence.evidence: Perennial has adopted Jump's Operate solution firmwide, with AI Intake Forms delivering structured client data via secure branded email, combined with Document Intelligence and CRM automation to automate follow-through across the full client lifecycle.
capability_evidence.metric: 27,000+ advisors on the Jump platform; firmwide deployment at Perennial

_enrichment.what_changed: Prior coverage established Jump's agentic execution launch and distribution scale as competitive benchmarks; this entry shows the business model consequence — that scale is now being monetized as a recruiting differentiator by RIA platforms, moving Jump's value proposition upstream from advisor productivity into firm-level growth strategy.

landscape_context.competitor_gap: Zocks ~5x behind on advisor distribution; neither Zocks nor Holistiplan have matched agentic execution capability

entry.headline: Finny's AI Prospecting Engine Reaches 11,000 Advisors via Osaic Distribution Deal
entry.the_so_what: By distributing through Osaic's network rather than selling seat-by-seat, Finny has effectively outsourced advisor acquisition to a single aggregator relationship — a go-to-market architecture that lets a startup with 1.8 billion daily intent signals reach 11,000 advisors and $700 billion in AUA overnight, compressing the adoption curve that took CRM incumbents like Salesforce years to replicate across comparable distribution footprints.
entry.summary: Finny's AI prospecting platform automates outbound client acquisition by tracking life events, segmenting prospects by intent, and running multi-channel campaigns across LinkedIn, email, voicemail, and direct mail — powered by a proprietary F-Score matching engine drawing on 1.8 billion daily intent signals. The platform is now available to 11,000 financial professionals across Osaic's network of more than 270 financial institutions, which oversees more than $700 billion in assets under administration. The distribution deal was announced January 29, 2026, with Osaic making Finny available as a platform-level resource rather than requiring individual advisor adoption. The stated goal is to reduce the time advisors spend manually researching and chasing leads, positioning prospecting as a minutes-level task rather than an hours-level one.

key_stat.label: financial professionals with access to Finny's AI prospecting platform via Osaic's network

capability_evidence.evidence: Finny's platform is live and available to Osaic's 11,000 advisors, enabling automated multi-step outreach campaigns using 1.8 billion daily intent signals to identify and engage prospects across multiple channels.
capability_evidence.metric: 1.8 billion daily intent signals ingested; 11,000 advisors reached across 270+ institutions

landscape_context.competitor_gap: No peers at this maturity level yet

_enrichment.notes: No prior coverage of Finny and no peer comparison data available for the client_acquisition segment; competitive positioning and maturity assessment are based solely on this single article.
